official_sources.function_or_member: ItemStack.EMPTY; EquipmentSlot.MAINHAND; ClientboundSetEquipmentPacket(int, List<Pair<EquipmentSlot, ItemStack>>); ClientboundSetEquipmentPacket.STREAM_CODEC; ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC
official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing and encoding the Play clientbound set_equipment one-entry empty ItemStack fixture.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_equipment packet id.

field_notes.item: Single entry with ItemStack.EMPTY only. Official ItemStack optional codec writes VarInt count 0, avoiding item registry and component patch bytes.
field_notes.entity: Primitive entity id fixture only; does not prove entity existence or equipment behavior.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_equipment packet framing and dispatch/decode for one MAINHAND ItemStack.EMPTY entry only; do not infer non-empty ItemStack, continuation-list handling, item registry, component patch, entity existence, equipment behavior, or client-load completion.
